rows.label: tev011602_MSG0001
rows.name:
Why? Why won't you kill me?
Don't you know what I've done?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011602_MSG0002
rows.name:
My death is the only possible ending
to the morality play I've created.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011602_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm the Blood Lobster! My whole
existence as a villain has been leading
up to the point which you kill me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011602_MSG0004
rows.name:
Now do it and bring this
story to its rightful end![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011602_MSG0005
rows.name:
No! Why won't you end this?!
AAAAAAAARRRGGHHHHHHH![ST:wait ]
